name: Nyonya (Malaysian) Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add eggs and fry until set. Remove with a spatula and cut into strips.
3. Add onion to the skillet and cook until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
4. Add remaining oil and stir-fry shrimp for one minute.
5. Stir-fry rice, vegetables, mushrooms, half of egg strips, onion, and seasonings together until well mixed for 3 minutes.
6. If needed, add a little water to prevent the rice from drying out.
7. Serve on a bed of shredded lettuce and top with remaining egg strips.
